data_description.connection_type: Choose how the RS485 bus is connected to this machine.

select_slave.title: DTSU666 Sniffer — Active polling
select_slave.description:
Found {count} device(s) on the bus: {slaves}.

Select a slave ID to enable active polling when the inverter is offline, or disable it and configure later via reconfigure.

data_description.always_poll: Only enable this if no inverter or other device is polling the meter. Two bus masters running simultaneously will cause communication errors.

progress.discovering: Scanning the RS485 bus for active Modbus slaves…

error.invalid_serial_port: Please enter or select a valid serial port path.
error.invalid_host: Please enter a valid hostname or IP address.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the TCP host. Check that the host/port are correct and the serial bridge is running.

abort.already_configured: This meter (same port and slave address) is already configured.

no_traffic_silent.title: No data received on RS485 bus
no_traffic_silent.description: **{name}** has been connected for 30 seconds but no bytes have been received at all. Check the serial port selection, RS485 adapter wiring, and that the inverter is powered on. This notice will clear automatically once traffic is detected.

no_traffic_crc.title: RS485 data received but all frames failing CRC
no_traffic_crc.description: **{name}** is receiving data but every frame fails its CRC check. This usually means the baud rate or parity setting does not match the meter. Check the baud rate and parity in the integration options. This notice will clear automatically once valid frames are decoded.

no_traffic_unknown.title: Modbus frames decoded but no meter data found
no_traffic_unknown.description: **{name}** is decoding valid Modbus frames but none match the expected DTSU666 register addresses. Check that the correct meter model is connected. This notice will clear automatically once meter data is seen.
